# PERF-003 positive: make([]int, len(items)) inside loop body
lang: go
file: PERF-003-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import "strings"

func GroupLines(texts []string) [][]string {
	var out [][]string
	for _, text := range texts {
		group := make([]string, len(texts))
		for i, other := range texts {
			if strings.Contains(other, text) {
				group[i] = other
			}
		}
		out = append(out, group)
	}
	return out
}
